jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Emeritus - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Emeritus, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Emeritus:
Emeritus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emeritus!
